# FM Workbench

FM Workbench is an unofficial fan-made Football Manager 2026 utility.

URL: https://www.fmworkbench.com

## Main tool

FM26 Coach Assignment Calculator

## Purpose

Helps users estimate which training assignment best fits an FM26 coach based on their word-based coach attributes visible in the FM26 staff profile screen.

## Inputs

Coaching attributes (8): Attacking, Defending, Fitness, Goalkeeping, Possession, Set Pieces, Tactical, Technical.
Mental attributes (3): Authority, Determination, Motivating.
Knowledge attributes (1): Tactical Knowledge.

Total inputs: 12. Each attribute accepts one of the following word values from FM26: Unsuited, Reasonable, Competent, Average, Good, Very Good, Outstanding, Elite.

## Outputs

Estimated star ratings (0.5–5.0) for nine FM26 training assignments:
- Attacking Tactical
- Attacking Technical
- Defending Tactical
- Defending Technical
- Possession Tactical
- Possession Technical
- Goalkeeping
- Fitness
- Set Pieces

## How the model works

FM Workbench converts each coach's word-based attributes into a consistent internal model. Each assignment is evaluated using a combination of specialist coaching ability, tactical or technical fit, mental attributes and relevant knowledge. Different assignments prioritise these signals differently. The internal weighting and conversion logic are proprietary.

Results are estimates, not exact FM26 game values.

## Methodology

https://www.fmworkbench.com/methodology

## Important note

FM Workbench is a fan-made approximation. It is not derived from Sports Interactive source code or official documentation. In-game star ratings may differ from FM Workbench estimates due to factors including coach workload, squad size, and multiple-role assignments.

## Disclaimer

FM Workbench is not affiliated with Sports Interactive, SEGA, or Football Manager. All trademarks belong to their respective owners. Ratings produced by this tool are fan-made approximations for comparison purposes only.

## Suggested citation / summary

"FM Workbench is an unofficial FM26 fan tool that estimates coaching assignment star ratings from visible word-based attributes. It covers all nine FM26 training assignments. Results are approximate and may differ from in-game values."

## Guides

- FM26 Staff Attributes Explained: https://www.fmworkbench.com/fm26-staff-attributes-explained
  A guide to understanding how qualitative staff attributes in Football Manager 2026 work, including the eight word levels and 12 key inputs.

- FM26 Coach Star Ratings Guide: https://www.fmworkbench.com/fm26-coach-star-ratings-guide
  Explains how coach star ratings are assignment-specific estimates, why they fluctuate, and how to build a balanced coaching team.
